privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real DFTT #7 NTFS Undelete test image downloaded from SourceForge. The original 6,160,384-byte image (MD5: e7dbb96759d9cd62b729463ebfe61dab) is artificially split into two fragments by setup_task.sh at exactly 3,072,000 bytes. The expected reconstructed image (restored.dd), reconstruction log, and hidden files CSV output paths explicitly match the task description instructions, export_result.sh extraction queries, and verifier.py checks. Local pytsk3-based block parsing identical to the setup script verified that the dataset contains exactly one allocated non-resident file whose data runs reside at or above the chunk boundary: 'tracking.log' (inode 28).
